title: stipa sabulosa
intro: Stipa sabulosa, also known as sand grass or sand blue grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Stipa sabulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Stipa sabulosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
